##NAMES=Wesselsite
##RRUFFID=R120019
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=SrCuSi_4_O_10_
##LOCALITY=Wessels mine, Kalahari manganese field, Northern Cape Province, South Africa
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=William W. Pinch
##DESCRIPTION=Dark blue massive, associated with R120057 lavinskyite and R120077 scottyite
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R120019
##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=(Sr_0.98_Ba_0.04_)Cu_1.05_Si_3.97_O_10_ ; (wesselsite is medium gray material in image, associated with samples R120057 lavinskyite, dark grey  and R120077 scottyite, light grey)
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 7.3819 b: 7.3819 c: 15.658 alpha: 90 beta: 90 gamma: 90 volume: 853.3 crystal system: tetragonal
##FILETYPE=Raman RAW
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
